summary: Iteration 5 frontend-only test focused on browser-language auto-detection in i18n.jsx (detectInitialLang). Verified DE/GA auto-detect, EN fallback for unsupported locales, user override via localStorage, navigator.languages priority order, and full regression across 8 routes. All 6 scenarios passed with zero console errors.

auto_detect_de.nav_text_observed: Startseite Produkte Tierfütterung Prozess Markteinblicke Kontakt

auto_detect_ga.nav_text_observed: Baile Táirgí Beathú Ainmhithe Próiseas Léargas Margaidh Teagmháil

user_override_wins.note: Saved choice (ga) wins over auto-detect (de). Confirmed.

navigator_languages_priority.note: First match in array wins — EN picked over DE/GA.

test_methodology: Used Playwright browser.new_context() per scenario plus page.add_init_script() to override navigator.language and navigator.languages before navigation. Each scenario used a fresh context (no shared localStorage). Active state verified via 'bg-kelp-600' class on the data-testid='header-lang-picker-{en|de|ga}' button.
critical_code_review_comments: detectInitialLang() in /app/frontend/src/i18n/i18n.jsx is correctly implemented: localStorage takes precedence, then navigator.languages iterated in order with base-code split('-')[0], finally 'en' fallback. SUPPORTED set ['en','de','ga'] matches LANGS. Try/catch around localStorage handles SSR/private mode.

Minor (non-blocking, carried over from iter 4): MobileMenu still mounts a duplicate LanguagePicker (testid 'mobile-lang-picker'). Header picker is now visible at all viewports, so the in-panel one is redundant — design choice, not a bug.
Minor: detectInitialLang is passed to useState as a function reference (lazy initializer) — correct. document.documentElement.lang is also synced in a useEffect on mount, ensuring SSR safety.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified detectInitialLang() auto-detection logic. Test pattern: use browser.new_context() + page.add_init_script() with Object.defineProperty on navigator.languages/language BEFORE goto. localStorage preset must be done in the same init script to apply pre-mount. All 6 scenarios + 8-route regression passed cleanly. No bugs found.
